reviews.review_description:
I'm very interested in buying the full version but I have two big issues with the demo.

#1 There's no head based locomotion option. I keep accidentally strafing when I move my hand.

#2 The graphics look really "vintage" for 2026. The lack of shadows cast by the flashlight is especially dated looking. Even the Steam VR trailer looks like Quest 2 game.

If the full version gets a graphical upgrade to take advantage of the Quest 3's hardware and an option for head based locomotion is added I'll give it a try.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks a ton for trying the demo and for the honest feedback, I really appreciate it.

Yeah, the locomotion thing is totally fair. We’re actually working on a head-based locomotion option right now. It should feel a lot more natural once that’s in.

And on the graphics you’re not wrong, the game has been in development for a while now and the primary target was the quest 2. We do have a visual upgrade planned after the initial release, including better lighting and overall improvements to take better advantage of newer hardware.

Really glad you called these out. Hopefully when those updates land, it’ll be more your kind of experience.

reviews.review_description: Oh wow, this is good. Love escape room and puzzles games. Got already some time in, and still not finished. This is a long demo. Love it.

reviews.review_title: Can we have the full version please
reviews.review_description: Loving this game, when will the full version be released

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for playing and for the love!
Just to let you know, CloserLook VR is being developed by a solo developer, which is a big part of why the process is taking a bit longer than usual.

That said, the full version is on track for release in the first quarter of next year. Taking this extra time helps ensure the final experience is polished, immersive, and truly worth it.

reviews.review_description: Very clever and interesting. Looking forward to full version
I loved this ! Hoping for more 🥰👍.

reviews.review_title: Interesting, still needs a lot of work
reviews.review_description:
The concept is intriguing and the puzzles are nice, so there is a lot of potential for an interesting story to be told.
But there a quite some bugs so far (like going 2m away from a computer where a video is playing - the video stays on screen, the controls disappear, blocking any further interaction), a lot of jank (physics are weird, doors opening in both directions doesn't make sense) and a lot of the world is built in a way that doesn't fit together. Why are doors so large, why is the "female bathroom" sign on the INSIDE of the room, why does the sign of the librarian say "liberian"?
It just feels cheap a lot of times.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for playing my demo and for the honest feedback!

I'm really glad you found the concept interesting and enjoyed the puzzles, that’s super encouraging to hear. The game is being made by me alone, so it’s definitely a work-in-progress, and I know it’s still rough around the edges.

You pointed out some totally valid stuff, especially the mail terminal bug, i didn't catch that in testing at all, the weird physics, the giant doors (that was a result of some clipping issues I had in early development but maybe i over did it. lol), and those little details like the misspelling and bathroom signs, they’re all on my radar now, and I really appreciate you catching them.

I’m doing my best to build something cool and different, and feedback like yours helps a ton. Thanks again for checking it out and sticking with it despite the rough edges. More care and polish is definitely going to be put in the final product.

reviews.review_title: Looking forward to the full release!
reviews.review_description: A very intriguing beginning to a mystery I’m looking forward to discovering more of. What begins as an escape room puzzler leads to conspiracies and something perhaps supernatural. A very enjoyable demo. The trailer teases so many more interesting areas to explore that I’ll definitely be looking out for the full release.
Cool game, but, Please, add Russian sub
Stumbled over this little gem now waiting for a full release!
